mapper.select: select * from fp_infrastructure where order by created_at desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
select * from fp_infrastructure where tenant_id = #{tenantId} order by created_at desc
select * from fp_infrastructure where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id}
select * from fp_infrastructure where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and code = #{code}
mapper.insert: insert into fp_infrastructure (id, tenant_id, type, code, name, env_id, region_id, endpoint, auth_type, username, password, api_key, sync_scope, sync_mode, sync_enabled, sync_interval_sec, run_status, connection_status, last_test_message, last_test_at, last_sync_at, last_sync_message, description, created_at, updated_at) values (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{type}, #{code}, #{name}, #{envId}, #{regionId}, #{endpoint}, #{authType}, #{username}, #{password}, #{apiKey}, #{syncScope}, #{syncMode}, #{syncEnabled}, #{syncIntervalSec}, #{runStatus}, #{connectionStatus}, #{lastTestMessage}, #{lastTestAt}, #{lastSyncAt}, #{lastSyncMessage}, #{description}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.delete: delete from fp_infrastructure where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id}
